key.description: Workflow module ID. Must start with a letter, first letter lowercase, can only contain letters, numbers, or underscores, camelCase naming is recommended, length no more than 20.

roleList.description: Allow the following application role members to initiate this workflow, can be empty by default, allowing all members in the application to initiate processes

enableNotification.description: Whether to enable node transfer notification

enableRecordBindMultiInstances.description: Whether to allow data table records to bind multiple workflow instances
